name: meter
visual_summary: A meter component is used to display progress or a value within a track. It is typically used to visualize data, track progress, or display statistics. Developers would use a meter when they need to communicate a specific value, progress, or status to the user.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: meter
Description: A meter component is used to display progress or a value within a track. It is typically used to visualize data, track progress, or display statistics. Developers would use a meter when they need to communicate a specific value, progress, or status to the user.
Style: default, customizable
Interactions: 
Tags: progress, visualization, tracking

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
